title: Recipe Page Foundation
description: Create the basic HTML page for your recipe collection website. Include the DOCTYPE declaration, html element, head with a title ('My Recipes'), and a body with an h1 heading and a welcome paragraph introducing the site.
starter_code:
# Recipe Collection Website — Step 1: Page Foundation
# Create a complete HTML5 page with doctype, html, head, title, body.
# Add an h1 heading and a welcome paragraph.

html = """
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>My Recipes</title>
</head>
<body>
    <!-- Add an h1 heading for the site -->

    <!-- Add a welcome paragraph -->

</body>
</html>
"""

print(html)
test_code: assert '' in html.lower(), 'Must include declaration' assert '' in html.lower() or ' tag' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Must include closing tag' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Must include tag' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Must include closing tag' assert '' in html.lower() and '' in html.lower(), 'Must include a element' assert 'my recipes' in html.lower(), 'Title should contain "My Recipes"' assert '<body>' in html.lower(), 'Must include <body> tag' assert '</body>' in html.lower(), 'Must include closing </body> tag' assert '<h1>' in html.lower() and '</h1>' in html.lower(), 'Must include an <h1> heading' assert '<p>' in html.lower() and '</p>' in html.lower(), 'Must include at least one <p> paragraph'
acceptance_criteria: Document has html, head, and body elements
An h1 heading introduces the site
A welcome paragraph is included in the body
hints:
Add a paragraph:

Welcome to my favorite recipes!
